name: 刚体动力学（HL：力矩/转动惯量/角动量）
subject: physics
domain_name: 主题 A · 空间、时间与运动 Space, Time and Motion
curriculum_points:
Standard level and higher level: 9 hours
Students should understand:
• that the motion of bodies through space and time can be described and analysed in terms of position, velocity, and acceleration
• velocity is the rate of change of position, and acceleration is the rate of change of velocity
• the change in position is the displacement
• the difference between distance and displacement
• the difference between instantaneous and average values of velocity, speed and acceleration, and how to determine them
• the equations of motion for solving problems with uniformly accelerated motion as given by
u+v
s= t
2
v=u+at
1
s=ut+ at2
2
v2=u2+2as
• motion with uniform and non-uniform acceleration

Standard level and higher level: 10 hours
Students should understand:
• Newton’s three laws of motion
• forces as interactions between bodies
• that forces acting on a body can be represented in a free-body diagram
• that free-body diagrams can be analysed to find the resultant force on a system
• the nature and use of the following contact forces
◦ normal force F is the component of the contact force acting perpendicular to the surface that
N
counteracts the body
◦ surface frictional force F acting in a direction parallel to the plane of contact between a body
f
and a surface, on a stationary body as given by F ≤μF or a body in motion as given by
f s N
F =μF where μ and μ are the coefficients of static and dynamic friction respectively
f d N s d
◦ tension
◦ elastic restoring force F following Hooke’s law as given by F =–kx where k is the spring
H H
constant
◦ viscous drag force F acting on a small sphere opposing its motion through a fluid as given by
d
F =6πηrv where η is the fluid viscosity, r is the radius of the sphere and v is the velocity of the
d
sphere through the fluid
◦ buoyancy F acting on a body due to the displacement of the fluid as given by F = ρVg where
b b
V is the volume of fluid displaced
• the nature and use of the following field forces
◦ gravitational force F is the weight of the body and calculated is given by F =mg
g g
◦ electric force F
e
◦ magnetic force F
m

Standard level and higher level: 8 hours
Students should understand:
• the principle of the conservation of energy
• that work done by a force is equivalent to a transfer of energy
• that energy transfers can be represented on a Sankey diagram
• that work W done on a body by a constant force depends on the component of the force along the line of displacement as given by W =Fs cos θ
• that work done by the resultant force on a system is equal to the change in the energy of the system
• that mechanical energy is the sum of kinetic energy, gravitational potential energy and elastic potential energy
• that in the absence of frictional, resistive forces, the total mechanical energy of a system is conserved
• that if mechanical energy is conserved, work is the amount of energy transformed between different forms of mechanical energy in a system, such as:
◦ 1 p2
the kinetic energy of translational motion as given by E = mv2=
k 2 2m
◦ the gravitational potential energy, when close to the surface of the Earth as given by
ΔE =mgΔh
p
◦ the elastic potential energy as given by E = 1 k(Δx)2
H 2
• that power developed P is the rate of work done, or the rate of energy transfer, as given by
ΔW
P= =Fv
Δt
• useful work out useful power out
efficiency η in terms of energy transfer or power as given by η= =
total work in total power in
• energy density of the fuel sources.

interactive_resources.description: GeoGebra 物理公式可视化：调节参数观察物理量关系

errors.description: 只记年代与名词，不能用史料与制度变迁解释历史进程。
把传说叙述与考古/文献证据混为一谈，未区分证据强度。

exercises.stem: 结合课标要求，说明「刚体动力学（HL：力矩/转动惯量/角动量）」的核心内涵，并各举一条史料或史实依据。
exercises.answer:
应答扣课标要点：Standard level and higher level: 9 hours
Students should understand:
• that the motion of bodies through space and time …；并区分证据类型（文献/考古/制度等）。

exercises.stem:
用因果链解释：Standard level and higher level: 10 hours
Students should understand:
• Newton’s… 对理解「刚体动力学（HL：力矩/转动惯量/角动量）」为何重要？
exercises.answer: 需写出前因—制度/经济/思想变化—后果，避免只罗列年代。
